---
title: "Math 119 Applied Calculus for Data Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


Use the links above to navigate to the Project Instructions and other resources.
<!-- This external course website had links to the Project Instructions, Project Templates, OpenStax Textbooks, and other resources. -->
![](./Images/calculus_word_cloud.png)
